title: Simple Binding
code: {{5 + 5}}
output: Displays: 10

title: ng-model Example
code: Hello {{name}}
output: Displays live typed text.

title: ng-init Example
code: {{x}}
output: Displays: 10

title: ng-repeat List
code: {{i}}
output: Displays: A B C

title: Button Click Event
code: {{count}}
output: Counts clicks.

title: Show/Hide Div
code: Visible
output: Shows or hides text.

title: ng-hide Example
code: Visible
output: Hides element when true.

title: Two Way Binding
code: {{msg}}
output: Live updates.

title: ng-controller Basic
code: {{name}}
output: Displays scope variable.

title: Controller Code
code: app.controller('myCtrl', function($scope){ $scope.name='Sonali'; });
output: Sets name variable.

title: Array with ng-repeat
code: • {{n}}
output: Displays numbers.

title: Object with ng-repeat
code: {{k}}: {{v}}
output: Displays key-value pairs.

title: ng-if Example
code: Shown
output: Displays if true.

title: ng-switch Example
code:
One

Two
output: Displays 'Two'.

title: ng-change Example
code: {{msg}}
output: Updates on change.

title: Disable Button
code: <button ng-disabled='true'>Click</button>
output: Button disabled.

title: Enable Button via Model
code: Enable
output: Enables button.

title: Filter Example
code: {{msg | uppercase}}
output: Displays HELLO.

title: Currency Filter
code: {{amount | currency}}
output: Displays ₹ 500.00

title: OrderBy Filter
code: {{a}}
output: Displays 1 2 3

title: LimitTo Filter
code: {{n}}
output: Displays only first two values.

title: Custom Filter Definition
code: app.filter('reverse',function(){ return function(x){ return x.split('').reverse().join(''); }});
output: Creates custom filter.

title: Custom Filter Usage
code: {{'hello' | reverse}}
output: Displays 'olleh'.

title: ng-disabled Example
code:
<input ng-model='age'>
<button ng-disabled='age<18'>Submit</button>
output: Button enabled when age ≥ 18.

title: Checkbox Binding
code: {{checked}}
output: Displays true/false.

title: Radio Button Binding
code:
Male Female

{{g}}
output: Displays gender value.

title: Select Dropdown
code: {{city}}
output: Shows selected city.

title: ng-options Example
code: <select ng-model='x' ng-options='n for n in [1,2,3]'></select>
output: Creates optimized select.

title: ng-animate Fade Example
code: Fading Text
output: Text fades in and out smoothly.

Sortable Table

Name Age
{{p.name}} {{p.age}}
output: Click headers to sort table.

This message is now visible!

output: Displays custom directive output.

title: Addition Calculator #1
code:
Addition Calculator #1

+

Result: {'{'}result{'}'}
input: User enters 10 and 20, clicks Add → Result: 30
output: Adds two numbers entered by the user and shows the sum.

title: Subtraction Calculator #1
code:
Subtraction Calculator #1

-

Result: {'{'}result{'}'}
input: User enters 50 and 12, clicks Subtract → Result: 38
output: Subtracts second number from the first and shows the result.

title: Four Operation Calculator #1
code:
Four Operation Calculator #1

Result: {'{'}result{'}'}
input: User selects '*' and enters 6 and 7 → Result: 42
output: Performs +, -, * or / based on selected operator.

title: Temperature Converter C→F #1
code:
Temperature Converter #1

Fahrenheit: {'{'}fahrenheit{'}'}
input: User enters 25 → Fahrenheit: 77
output: Converts a Celsius value to Fahrenheit and displays it.

title: Full Name Joiner #1
code:
Full Name Joiner #1

Full name: {'{'}fullName{'}'}
input: User types 'Sumit' and 'Sonar' → Full name: Sumit Sonar
output: Joins first and last name with a space.

title: String Length and Words Counter #1
code:
Text Analyzer #1

Characters: {'{'}text.length || 0{'}'}

Words: {'{'}(text && text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length) || 0{'}'}
input: User types 'Hello Angular JS' → Characters: 16, Words: 3
output: Counts characters and words in the textarea content.
